[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Edgar to dao_protocol extraction: execution-roadmap convention + plan + Stripe routing doc
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/185
  
  Details:
  Scoped extracting the DAO/Agroverse integration surface out of the Rails sentiment_importer (Edgar) app into a Python FastAPI service (dao_protocol), leaving Edgar as a pure trading platform. Confirmed near-zero coupling between the DAO glue and the trading DB; traced Stripe payment paths across sentiment_importer, agroverse_shop, and capoeira. Deliverables (PR 185): (1) OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS section 5 establishing the standing convention that a tracked execution roadmap checklist (pre-flight + sequenced PR plan + resume tracker) must precede any multi-step implementation; (2) EDGAR_DAO_EXTRACTION_PLAN.md with PR0-PR7 plan, deploy topology, and a resume tracker; (3) STRIPE_LEDGER_ROUTING.md updated with the previously-undocumented consumer product-QR scan flow where Edgar /qr-code-check creates a Stripe session server-side and reconciles the sale synchronously.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
